list.name: Changes
list.comment: `feat(ui): add custom button and input components` --- - Introduced CustomButton for reusable button UI. - Added NewTaskInput with error handling and focus styles. - Created TasksFilterBar for filtering tasks. - Implemented TasksList and TasksListItem for displaying tasks. - Added TasksListEmpty for empty state representation.

task.summary: `feat(layout): restructure layout components` --- - Replace TabLayout with RootLayout using Expo Router's Stack. - Simplify HomeScreen to display a basic edit instruction. - Update package.json to include @react-native-async-storage/async-storage. - Add .gitignore and project configuration files.

`feat(dependencies): add async-storage and reorder worklets` --- * Added "@react-native-async-storage/async-storage" version 2.2.0 to dependencies. * Reordered "react-native-worklets" in dependencies for consistency.

`feat(storage): implement task storage functions` --- - Add AsyncStorage integration for task management - Create functions to load and save tasks from offline storage - Define TaskItemDataType and TaskFilterKeyType interfaces

feat(tasks): add custom hook for task management
- Implement useTaskMethods hook to manage tasks - Load and save tasks from offline storage - Provide filtering, adding, and toggling functionalities

`feat(storage): enhance task storage management`
* Refactor loadTasksFromOfflineStorage to handle corrupt data gracefully * Simplify saveTasksToOfflineStorage by removing unnecessary checks * Add clearTasksFromOfflineStorage function for clearing tasks * Introduce generateQuickGuid for unique task IDs

`feat(ui): add custom button and input components` --- - Introduced CustomButton for reusable button UI. - Added NewTaskInput with error handling and focus styles. - Created TasksFilterBar for filtering tasks. - Implemented TasksList and TasksListItem for displaying tasks. - Added TasksListEmpty for empty state representation.

MESSAGE.value: `feat(layout): restructure layout components` --- - Replace TabLayout with RootLayout using Expo Router's Stack. - Simplify HomeScreen to display a basic edit instruction. - Update package.json to include @react-native-async-storage/async-storage. - Add .gitignore and project configuration files.

`feat(dependencies): add async-storage and reorder worklets` --- * Added "@react-native-async-storage/async-storage" version 2.2.0 to dependencies. * Reordered "react-native-worklets" in dependencies for consistency.

`feat(storage): implement task storage functions` --- - Add AsyncStorage integration for task management - Create functions to load and save tasks from offline storage - Define TaskItemDataType and TaskFilterKeyType interfaces

feat(tasks): add custom hook for task management
- Implement useTaskMethods hook to manage tasks - Load and save tasks from offline storage - Provide filtering, adding, and toggling functionalities

`feat(storage): enhance task storage management`
* Refactor loadTasksFromOfflineStorage to handle corrupt data gracefully * Simplify saveTasksToOfflineStorage by removing unnecessary checks * Add clearTasksFromOfflineStorage function for clearing tasks * Introduce generateQuickGuid for unique task IDs

`feat(ui): add custom button and input components` --- - Introduced CustomButton for reusable button UI. - Added NewTaskInput with error handling and focus styles. - Created TasksFilterBar for filtering tasks. - Implemented TasksList and TasksListItem for displaying tasks. - Added TasksListEmpty for empty state representation.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: `feat(ui): add custom button and input components` --- - Introduced CustomButton for reusable button UI. - Added NewTaskInput with error handling and focus styles. - Created TasksFilterBar for filtering tasks. - Implemented TasksList and TasksListItem for displaying tasks. - Added TasksListEmpty for empty state representation.
